data.title: Alibaba CFO Toby Xu Touts 5% Drop In Share Count Thanks To Aggressive Buybacks As Jack Ma-Founded Company Basks In Stellar Q3 Results
data.description: Alibaba Group Holding Ltd. has achieved a significant 5% reduction in share count over the past nine months through aggressive buyback initiatives, demonstrating strong capital return commitment amid robust financial performance.

data.title: Elon Musk's X Hit With $1.42 Million Fine From Brazil Judge He Once Labeled 'Dictator'
data.description: Brazil's Supreme Court has fined Elon Musk's X $1.42 million for failing to comply with a court order to remove a misinformation-spreading profile and provide user data, escalating the platform's legal troubles in the country.
